name: TrustPilot
highlight_text: Best suited for: SMBs, SaaS, Ecommerce, Agencies
description:
__POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__

What Trustpilot Does

Trustpilot is a well-known customer review platform that integrates tightly with Google and helps businesses manage and promote authentic customer reviews. It provides robust review analytics, automated request tools, and trust-building social proof features for websites and campaigns.

While it isn’t fully white-label, its brand power, customization options, and third-party integrations make it a strong addition to your Google review management stack. 

Source: G2

Key Features

  • Automated email and website review invites
  • Google Seller Ratings syndication
  • Review widgets for websites and landing pages
  • Advanced moderation and fraud detection
  • Review response workflows and alerts
  • Public profile pages for SEO and visibility
  • API access and integrations with ecommerce platforms

Benefits of TrustPilot

  • Understand how customers discover and interact with your listings before visiting.
  • Never miss responding to your reviews with an automated consolidated inbox.
  • Improve operational efficiency by delegating review management per location.
  • Targeted expert guidance for continuously optimizing your local search presence.
  • Latest insights into extracting maximum value from your reputation management efforts.
  • Seamless integration with the systems and platforms you already utilize.

Pricing

Free tier available. Business plans start at $225/month.

Pros

✅ Strong Google integration and syndication

✅ Widgets help drive trust and conversions

✅ Large, trusted brand with high visibility

Cons

❌ Not a fully white-labeled platform

❌ Limited flexibility on branding or dashboard customization

‍
summing_up_description:
__POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__

A good Google review management tool that not only helps you seamlessly take care of your existing reviews, but also helps you generate more positive reviews to help your local rankings. While almost all review tools provide the option for managing Google reviews, it’s best to think of the longer term and pick a tool that gives you the option to scale to other review sites as well.

Try Synup’s Google review tool!

Synup helps you connect all your locations on Google and manage reviews seamlessly. We also help you rank better for relevant local search terms by improving your online reputation.

‍
